overview.description: Cocos Creator UI状态控制器系统 - A state management system for Cocos Creator game engine inspired by FairyGUI controller, providing powerful UI state switching and component management capabilities

architecture.style: Monorepo with Component-Based Architecture - Multi-package structure with core library, installer extensions, and utility tools

key_components.name: StateController
key_components.description: Core state controller component that manages state groups, handles state switching, maintains StateSelect cache for performance, and provides intelligent inspector refresh mechanisms

key_components.name: StateSelect
key_components.description: State selector component attached to child nodes, responsible for executing property changes when controller state changes, supports multiple property types and sync modes

key_components.name: StatePropHandler
key_components.description: Property handler system implementing Strategy pattern, provides unified interface for getting/setting different property types (Position, Color, Scale, SpriteFrame, etc.)

key_components.name: StateErrorManager
key_components.description: Centralized error handling and logging system with graceful fallback support, node validation, and user-friendly error messages

key_components.name: StateEnum
key_components.description: Enumeration definitions for state names, update types, property types, sync modes, and inspector refresh modes

key_components.name: Property Handlers
key_components.description: Modular property handler implementations for Node properties (Position, Scale, Color, etc.), Component properties (Label, Sprite, etc.), and Widget properties

key_components.name: ccc-state-controller-installer
key_components.description: Cocos Creator editor extension package for installing and managing state controller in game projects, provides panel UI and quick install/update features

key_components.name: ccc-smart-component-manager
key_components.description: Smart component manager extension providing advanced component search, auto-mounting, favorites management, and quick component addition features

key_components.name: Test Infrastructure
key_components.description: Isolated Jest testing environment with Cocos Creator mocks, supporting TypeScript tests with ts-jest, includes unit tests for StateController, StateSelect, and StatePropHandler

key_components.name: Runtime Assets
key_components.description: Production runtime version of state controller components used in actual game projects, mirrors the core library structure

enhancement.title: 优化 ccc-state-controller: 单元测试完善 + UI/UX 重构
enhancement.description: 单元测试完善: 227+ 测试用例, 95.37% 覆盖率; UI/UX重构: 4.5:1对比度, cursor-pointer, focus-visible
